hero.title:
SEARCH, PAYMENT AND LOGISTICS OF
GOODS FROM CHINA

partnership.title:
For us, clients are,
first and foremost, partners
partnership.text:
We provide transport and logistics
services, helping companies establish operations in foreign
economic activities with
opportunities for growth and development.
partnership.text_2:
Many clients return to us again,
because since 2019 we have earned their trust.
Our reliable network of foreign
partners allows us to promptly solve
tasks: searching, purchasing, and delivering goods
from abroad to Russia.

order.suptext: Not only do we find, pay for, and deliver<2/>goods from China to Russia, <1> but we also provide services </1>

Conducting negotiations and factory
audits, buyout and reduction of the purchase cost of goods.
order.title_2: Cargo delivery from China to Russia

Auto delivery, rail delivery,
air delivery, sea delivery.
order.text_3:
Consolidation, packaging, storage,
product labeling, fulfillment.
order.text_4:
Financial and legal support
of contracts, logistics organization,
product certification.
order.text_5:
FCL container shipments,
LCL consolidated cargo from China.

Customs broker, customs
clearance at CEDs CTU, (posts and
bonded warehouses), refund of security.

questions.title: Frequently Asked Questions
questions.list_1: What are the restrictions for ordering?
questions.list_3: What information needs to be provided for the order?
questions.list_4: Who will pick up your order?
questions.list_5: I will buy the product myself — delivery FLG is needed
questions.list_6: What are the restrictions on transporting goods?
questions.list_7: Why can't the exact delivery cost be known in advance?
questions.list_8: How can packaging affect the price of a product?
questions.list_9: Is insurance necessary and what does it cover?

answer_1: Orders are accepted only for goods that are allowed for transportation and do not fall under customs or legal restrictions.
answer_2: You need to fill out the form on the website, specify the product, quantity, and contact information. After confirmation, the order will be processed.
answer_3: The name of the product, a link or description, quantity, as well as the delivery address.
answer_4: The redemption is carried out by our team according to the provided information, after which the product is sent to you.
answer_5: If you have already purchased the product, we can arrange delivery through the FLG service.
answer_6: It is forbidden to transport prohibited goods (for example, weapons, drugs, perishable products). There are also restrictions on weight and dimensions.
answer_7: The final price depends on the weight, volume, packaging, and route. Therefore, the exact amount is calculated after the product is prepared.
answer_8: The larger and heavier the package, the higher the shipping cost. Compact and lightweight packaging helps reduce expenses.
answer_9: Insurance is recommended: it covers loss or damage of goods during transportation.
answer_10: Delivery is available throughout the country and to most international destinations, depending on the carrier's terms.
